info.name: WHOOP 5.0/MG Activity Tracker - 12 Month Membership - Health and Fitness Wearable – 24/7 Activity and Sleep Tracker, Personalized Coaching, Menstrual Cycle Insights – 14+ Days Battery Life

features: HSA/FSA ELIGIBLE: All 12-month WHOOP memberships and WHOOP battery packs are eligible for HSA/FSA reimbursement.
EVERYTHING YOU NEED IS INCLUDED: Your WHOOP purchase includes a 12-month WHOOP Life membership, a WHOOP MG device, a SuperKnit Luxe band, and a waterproof* Wireless PowerPack.

CONTINUOUS MONITORING: WHOOP continuously monitors your physiological data, including sleep, stress, VO2 max, blood pressure*, and heart health metrics—providing 24/7 insights to optimize fitness, recovery, and overall health.
ADVANCED INSIGHTS: WHOOP Life seamlessly integrates total-health screening into your routine
ON-DEMAND ECG READINGS: With electrocardiogram readings, Heart Screener detects potential signs of AFib to help you stay informed about your heart health.*
FIRST-OF-ITS-KIND BLOOD PRESSURE TECHNOLOGY: Get blood pressure insights*, including systolic and diastolic ranges, and learn about how blood pressure affects your well-being and performance.

specifications.name: Customer Reviews

reviews.title: The best fitness gadgets
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 9, 2026
reviews.content: The WHOOP is honestly one of the best fitness trackers I’ve used. It’s not just about steps, it really helps you understand your body on a deeper level. I also use an Apple Watch, and I’ve noticed a slight difference in step counts between the two, but it’s nothing major. The WHOOP still gives a solid sense of daily activity and complements the broader health insights. For work, it’s been super useful. I can actually see how stressful or busy days affect my energy and recovery, which helps me pace myself better and avoid feeling drained. The sleep tracking is amazing. It shows way more than just hours slept, you get details on sleep stages and recovery, so you can actually improve your sleep habits and feel more rested. It’s really comfortable to wear all the time, even while sleeping, which makes a big difference. Overall, I’d easily give it a 5/5,it just makes it easier to stay on top of your health, work, and daily routine. Read more

reviews.title: Great product, blows Apple Watch stats away

reviews.content: Great device, very informative with the breakdowns of workouts, sleep and suggestions for workouts. App is very easy to navigate and keeps you motivated with the groups. Great battery life and can take a beating, no worries about getting it wet. Read more

The insights are easy to follow and very useful if you care about health and fitness data. Overall, a great device and definitely worth it. Read more

reviews.title: Major Heart Rate Inaccuracy During Workouts + Poor Support Experience
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
reviews.content: I wanted to share my experience with WHOOP because it’s been one of the most frustrating purchases I’ve made in a while. The core issue is simple: the heart rate data during workouts is not accurate… I tested this side-by-side with: - A Garmin chest strap (gold standard for HR) - An Apple Watch Both of those devices consistently matched each other, and I even manually checked my pulse during workouts — again, same result. Meanwhile, WHOOP was often 20+ beats per minute off during the exact same sessions. This wasn’t a one-off issue either. I tested multiple workouts: - Cross training session - Run/walk workout Same problem every time. I went through all of WHOOP’s troubleshooting steps: - Wore it exactly as instructed (above wrist bone, tight fit, no LEDs visible) - Tried bicep placement - Cleaned sensor and skin - Updated firmware/app - Restarted everything Nothing fixed it. What’s more frustrating is the support experience. Instead of addressing the issue, they repeatedly said this level of variance is “normal” due to sampling differences. That explanation doesn’t hold up when: - The other two devices are continuously measuring - They match each other AND manual pulse checks - WHOOP is the only outlier At that point, it’s not “variance” — it’s inaccurate data. And that’s the biggest problem: WHOOP’s entire value is its data and insights. If the heart rate data is wrong, then: - Strain scores are wrong - Recovery scores are unreliable - Training recommendations can’t be trusted So the whole product breaks down. I also requested a replacement after extensive troubleshooting, and they refused — continuing to ask for more photos and repeating the same steps I had already completed multiple times. To make things worse, if you buy through Amazon, returns can take 2+ months and require multiple conversations with support. That just adds another layer of frustration. Bottom line: - Hardware feels cheaper than competitors - Heart rate accuracy (at least in my case) is significantly off during workouts - Support was not helpful in resolving the issue - The product doesn’t deliver on its core promise if the data isn’t reliable I really wanted this to work because the app and concept are great. But right now, it’s hard to recommend when the most important metric — heart rate — isn’t dependable. Hopefully this improves in the future, but based on my experience, I would look elsewhere. Read more

reviews.title: I love my new Whoop
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 6, 2026
reviews.content: My Whoop is a very comfortable and a very complete health monitor. I am very pleased with my purchase. It details my sleep quality and also gives tips on how to improve. The size does not interfere with movement. It is a bit on the expensive side, but the information can be sent to your doctor to share individual data over a period of time. I have not shared information with my doctor, yet but it is a great health fearure.  I am in a community with my friends. I am trying to improve my sleep quality and my Whoop is very helpful as I try to maximize sleep quality. I love my Whoop! Read more

reviews.title: Autonomie au top et suivi ultra personnalisé
reviews.content: Excellent abonnement 12 mois pour profiter pleinement du Whoop. L’autonomie est vraiment impressionnante : on oublie presque qu’il faut le recharger, et même pendant la charge avec le module sans fil, on ne ressent aucune gêne. Le bracelet est très confortable, il n’entrave pas les mouvements du corps, que ce soit au quotidien ou pendant le sport. L’application est bien pensée, avec une large sélection de questions et de paramètres qui permet un suivi extrêmement personnalisé. On a vraiment l’impression d’avoir un assistant qui prend en compte ce qu’on lui dit pour ajuster ses recommandations et mieux accompagner récupération, sommeil et entraînements au fil du temps Read more

reviews.title: Für Fitness & Alltag
reviews.content: Absolute Empfehlung für Sport & Alltag Ich nutze das WHOOP-Armband nun seit einiger Zeit und bin wirklich begeistert. Besonders überzeugt mich, wie präzise und verständlich die Daten aufbereitet werden. Schlaf, Erholung, Belastung und Herzfrequenzvariabilität werden detailliert analysiert und helfen mir enorm dabei, mein Training smarter zu planen und Überlastung zu vermeiden. Das Armband ist sehr leicht, angenehm zu tragen und stört weder beim Sport noch im Alltag oder Schlaf. Ein großer Pluspunkt ist auch, dass es kein Display hat – dadurch wird man nicht abgelenkt und konzentriert sich mehr auf das eigene Körpergefühl. Die App ist übersichtlich, modern und liefert echte Mehrwerte, keine unnötigen Zahlen. Besonders die Erholungs- und Schlafanalysen haben mir geholfen, meine Routinen zu verbessern und leistungsfähiger zu werden. Für alle, die Sport ernst nehmen oder einfach ihren Körper besser verstehen möchten, ist WHOOP meiner Meinung nach eines der besten Tools auf dem Markt. Preis-Leistung passt absolut, da man kontinuierlich hochwertige Auswertungen erhält. Read more

reviews.title: Excellent - life-changer!
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on April 18, 2026
reviews.content: If I could give 10 stars I would! I bought the high spec 'Life' version and even at what I paid (£349) I think it is crazy value for money and I shall most definitely be renewing again after 12 months. It has provided invaluable data and intelligence, supporting my cardiac issues, sleep management, exercise regime, rest, recovery management eating times and so much more. The user interface and experience is very. Battery life of over a week and quick recharge means I'm never without it (with the clip-on charger you can charge it while using it at the gym etc. I thought my Apple Watch and phone were good, but this is on a totally different level. In my case it's literally a life-changer. Read more

reviews.title: 柔術のスパーリング用に最適
reviews.content: これまでoura ringを使って満足していましたが、指輪という性質上柔術のスパーリング中につけることができないため、こちらを購入しました。英語しかないため、少しわかりづらいですが、電池の持ちも1週間は問題なく持ち概ね満足です。日本語対応に期待したいです。 Read more
